data.name: Loot Line - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
RISE TO BE LEGEND OF THE SEAS 

As the Captain of your ship get ready to command your crew who are eager to serve you. Are you prepared for the challenges ahead? Show them you're the greatest Captain they've ever known!

  WIN THE HEARTS OF YOUR CREW 

Spend quality time with your girls and earn their trust. Each has a unique personality, desires, and secrets waiting to be discovered. As your bond deepens, they’ll open up to you completely—mind, body, and soul.  

  GIRLS & TREASURE AWAITS 

Are you ready to take it all for yourself? Lot of HQ ADULT CONTENT enveloped in great storyline waiting just for you!
Your journey will be filled with comedy, drama, and lots of sex. 


 OVER 7500+ STATIC IMAGES AND MORE THAN 250 SOUNDED ANIMATED SCENES

 AN ENGAGING MYSTERY AND STORYLINE 

 PLENTY OF VARIOUS SEX SCENES WITH VARIOUS GIRLS 

 PLENTY OF KINKS AND FETISHES

data.short_description: Set sail on the high seas! Choice-driven story where your decisions shape the journey. As a daring pirate captain, you'll navigate treacherous waters, form alliances, and uncover hidden treasures. But beware, danger lurks at every corner, and only the bravest will survive!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文, 捷克文, 波蘭文, 泰文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 顯示卡: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 顯示卡: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
